0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h1","children":"Data Privacy"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne's privacy-first design ensures your data stays under your control."}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Privacy Principles"}],"\n",["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Data minimization"}],": Only store what's necessary"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Local processing"}],": No cloud required — all data and embeddings stay local"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"User control"}],": Full control via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"remember()"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"recall()"}],", and ",["$","code",null,{"children":"forget()"}]]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Transparency"}],": All operations are inspectable via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"get_stats()"}]]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Data Flow"}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"children":[["$","p",null,{"children":"flowchart LR\nU[User Input] -->|Local| M[Mnemosyne]\nM -->|Local| E[fastembed Embeddings]\nM -->|Local| DB[(SQLite)]"}],["$","p",null,{"children":"style M fill:#e0f2fe,stroke:#0284c7\nstyle DB fill:#f0fdf4,stroke:#16a34a"}]]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Minimizing External Calls"}],"\n",["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Strategy"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Implementation"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Local embeddings"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"BAAI/bge-small-en-v1.5 via fastembed (default)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"No telemetry"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"No analytics or tracking"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"No cloud dependency"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"All features work offline"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Self-hosted"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Run entirely on your infrastructure"}]]}]]}]]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Data Retention"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["Use the ",["$","code",null,{"children":"valid_until"}]," parameter on ",["$","code",null,{"children":"remember()"}]," to set expiration times for memories:"]}],"\n",["$","$L4",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne import Mnemosyne\nfrom datetime import datetime, timedelta\n\nmem = Mnemosyne(session_id=\"support-bot\")\n\n# Memory expires in 30 days\nmem.remember(\n  content=\"User prefers dark mode\",\n  importance=0.3,\n  valid_until=(datetime.now() + timedelta(days=30)).isoformat(),\n)\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Data Deletion"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["Remove specific memories using ",["$","code",null,{"children":"forget()"}],":"]}],"\n",["$","$L4",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne import Mnemosyne\n\nmem = Mnemosyne(session_id=\"default\")\n\n# Store a memory\nmem.remember(\n  content=\"User email is alice@example.com\",\n  importance=0.5,\n)\n\n# Delete a specific memory by ID\nstats = mem.get_stats()\n# ... find the memory_id ...\nmem.forget(memory_id=\"mem_abc123\")\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Scope-Based Isolation"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["Use the ",["$","code",null,{"children":"scope"}]," parameter to control memory visibility:"]}],"\n",["$","$L4",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne import Mnemosyne\n\nmem = Mnemosyne(session_id=\"my-agent\")\n\n# Session-scoped memory (default)\nmem.remember(\n  content=\"Working on bug #42\",\n  scope=\"session\",\n)\n\n# Global memory visible across sessions\nmem.remember(\n  content=\"Project uses Python 3.12\",\n  scope=\"global\",\n)\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"PII Handling"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne does not automatically detect or redact PII. Best practices:"}],"\n",["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["Use ",["$","code",null,{"children":"metadata"}]," dict to flag PII-containing memories"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["Set ",["$","code",null,{"children":"valid_until"}]," for time-limited PII retention"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["Use separate ",["$","code",null,{"children":"session_id"}]," values to isolate PII by context"]}],"\n","$L5","\n"]}],"\n","$L6"],["$L7"],"$L8"]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"a7Z8buxtE-LVtBntTgeEr"}
5:["$","li",null,{"children":["Use ",["$","code",null,{"children":"forget()"}]," to remove PII when no longer needed"]}]
6:["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-success","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L9",null,{"iconNode":[["path",{"d":"M21.801 10A10 10 0 1 1 17 3.335","key":"yps3ct"}],["path",{"d":"m9 11 3 3L22 4","key":"1pflzl"}]],"className":"lucide-circle-check-big shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"Privacy by Default"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne runs entirely offline. All embedding generation uses fastembed locally. No data ever leaves your machine."}]}]]}]]}]}]
